summary: IDF forces eliminated multiple high‑value militants in the West Bank and Gaza, while also striking suspected infiltrators in southern Lebanon. Israeli air and drone attacks continued in Gaza, including near the Italian compound in the Al‑Nasr district, and a recent strike in southern Lebanon killed two suspects crossing the security zone. Iranian officials publicly condemned Israeli actions and pledged resistance, while Hezbollah‑linked rhetoric warned Israel of further escalation.
key_points: IDF and Shin Bet forces killed Mahmad Zeid, a weapons dealer linked to a 2025 attack that wounded two soldiers, in the Yaamun area of the West Bank (Source: @idf_telegram/24433).
The Israeli Air Force struck a vehicle carrying two suspects who had crossed the security zone in the Al‑Ta'ar ridge area of southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/24434).
IDF forces eliminated Abu Hdaid, a commander in the Islamic Jihad production network, in Khan Younis, Gaza (Source: @New_security8200/202079).
An Israeli strike near the Italian compound in the Al‑Nasr district of Gaza was reported (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372771).
Hezbollah‑affiliated statements warned Israel to withdraw from Lebanon or face defeat, referencing historic battles (Source: @naya_foriraq/79841).
Iranian President Pezeshkian met families of martyrs from the recent US‑Israeli imposed war on Iran (Source: @presstv/195587).
A drone attack by Israel targeted southern Lebanon, reported between the Meifdon and Zotr settlements (Source: @SharghDaily/168039).
An Israeli soldier was killed in a vehicle accident in southern Lebanon during an operational mission (Source: @almogboker78/17585).

sections.executive_summary: IDF forces eliminated high‑value militants in the West Bank and Gaza, including a weapons dealer and a Jihad production commander. Israeli air strikes targeted infiltrators in southern Lebanon and a site near the Italian compound in Gaza. Iranian officials publicly condemned Israeli actions and Hezbollah‑linked rhetoric warned of further escalation.

points: Iranian President Pezeshkian met with families of martyrs from the recent US‑Israeli imposed war on Iran, underscoring domestic mobilization against perceived aggression (Source: @presstv/195587).
Iran's Chief Negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf dismissed US claims about Iranian assets funding American agriculture, reflecting ongoing diplomatic tension (Source: @presstv/195582).
Iranian leadership participated in Ashura commemorations, signaling continued internal religious mobilization (Source: @naya_foriraq/79852).
Hezbollah‑affiliated commander Ismail Qaani called for Israeli withdrawal from Lebanon, invoking historic resistance narratives (Source: @naya_foriraq/79841).
IDF and Shin Bet operatives killed Mahmad Zeid, a weapons dealer linked to a 2025 attack that wounded two soldiers, in the Yaamun area of the West Bank (Source: @idf_telegram/24433).
The Israeli Air Force engaged and destroyed a vehicle carrying two suspects who crossed the security zone in the Al‑Ta'ar ridge of southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/24434).
IDF forces eliminated Abu Hdaid, a commander in the Islamic Jihad weapons production network, in Khan Younis, Gaza (Source: @New_security8200/202079).
An Israeli strike near the Italian compound in the Al‑Nasr district of Gaza was reported, indicating continued targeting of foreign‑linked sites (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372771).
A drone attack by Israel targeted an area between Meifdon and Zotr settlements in southern Lebanon (Source: @SharghDaily/168039).
An Israeli soldier was killed in a vehicle accident during an operational mission in southern Lebanon (Source: @almogboker78/17585).
Mahmad Zeid, a weapons dealer who supplied arms for a 2025 attack, was killed by IDF and Shin Bet forces in the Yaamun area of the West Bank (Source: @idf_telegram/24433).
IDF reported the elimination of Abu Hdaid, a senior Islamic Jihad production commander, in Khan Younis, Gaza (Source: @New_security8200/202079).
An Israeli strike near the Italian compound in the Al‑Nasr district of Gaza was documented, highlighting targeting of foreign‑linked infrastructure (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/372771).
Israeli forces reported a drone strike in southern Gaza targeting militant positions, though specific casualties were not detailed (Source: @SharghDaily/168039).
The Israeli Air Force struck a vehicle with two suspects crossing the security zone in the Al‑Ta'ar ridge area of southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/24434).
Lebanese media reported two fatalities from an Israeli strike targeting a car near Kafr Rumman in southern Lebanon (Source: @manniefabian/58676).
An Israeli drone operation hit a target between Meifdon and Zotr settlements in southern Lebanon (Source: @SharghDaily/168039).
Hezbollah‑linked statements warned Israel to withdraw from Lebanon or face defeat, referencing historic battles (Source: @naya_foriraq/79841).
No direct operational reports concerning Syria or Iraq were found in the provided messages.
No direct operational reports concerning Gulf states were found in the provided messages.

key_developments: IDF and Shin Bet eliminated Mahmad Zeid, a weapons dealer linked to a 2025 attack, in Yaamun, West Bank (Source: @idf_telegram/24433).
Israeli Air Force destroyed a vehicle carrying two infiltrators in the Al‑Ta'ar ridge, southern Lebanon (Source: @idf_telegram/24434).
IDF killed Abu Hdaid, a senior Islamic Jihad production commander, in Khan Younis, Gaza (Source: @New_security8200/202079).

sections.threat_assessment: The elimination of high‑value militants in the West Bank and Gaza demonstrates Israel's intensified counter‑terror operations, while air strikes in southern Lebanon indicate a focus on preventing cross‑border infiltration. Hezbollah‑linked rhetoric suggests a willingness to escalate if Israeli forces remain in Lebanese territory. Iranian political statements, though largely diplomatic, reinforce a narrative of resistance that could translate into proxy actions against Israeli interests.
sections.regional_response: Lebanese authorities have reported casualties from Israeli strikes, reflecting heightened tension along the Israel‑Lebanon border. Iranian officials have publicly condemned Israeli actions and pledged continued resistance, potentially encouraging proxy groups. International observers note the risk of broader escalation as both sides increase targeted operations.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of militant movement in the Yaamun area is critical following the elimination of a key weapons dealer. Surveillance of infiltration routes in southern Lebanon should be intensified after recent vehicle interceptions. Continued tracking of Hezbollah communications is advised given recent threats to Israeli forces.
